title: sharktide/InferencePort-Web
summary: Official website for InferencePort AI: The all in one AI platform

title: piporyx/doc-qa-agent
summary: 🤖 Create an interactive chatbot that answers questions from documents using OpenAI and Ollama, with a user-friendly Gradio interface.

title: syedahmad0786/compactrag
summary: Implementation of CompactRAG (arXiv 2602.05728): atomize the corpus into self-contained Q→A facts offline, then answer multi-hop questions in exactly 2 LLM calls — decompose + synthesize, with vector lookups doing the hops. Free local Ollama.

title: dev-core-busy/jarvis
summary: Self-hosted autonomous AI agent for Linux — multi-LLM, real desktop control (VNC), WhatsApp, RAG knowledge base, sandboxed security layer, OpenClaw skills

title: mikeljc-dev/docsera
summary: AI chat widget for your docs — open source, self-hosted, privacy-first. RAG with citations. Works with Anthropic, OpenAI or local models via Ollama.

title: soenneker/soenneker.semantickernel.pool.ollama
summary: Provides Ollama-specific registration extensions for KernelPoolManager, enabling integration with local LLMs via Semantic Kernel.

title: PatriceA/octipus
summary: An open-source, self-hosted assistant that delegates real work to a swarm of specialist AI agents.

title: CrispStrobe/CrispSorter
summary: AI-powered document organiser. Extracts text and/or sorts documents: Drop in a bunch of PDFs, DOCX files, or ebooks, and it extracts Document Text, identifies Title, Author, and Year, with a local or remote LLM, and moves them into folders, and/or keeps the extracted text.

title: noshitcoding/LocalAI-Cowork
summary: Open-source, local-first AI coworker for Windows with Ollama, MCP tools, files, tasks, and approval controls.

title: elemsi/forecastgpt-financial-outlook-agent
summary: 📊 Automate financial analysis and forecasting with ForecastGPT, leveraging AI to extract insights from reports and streamline decision-making.

title: syedahmad0786/agent-patterns
summary: Anthropic's 'Building Effective Agents' patterns as five short, framework-free, traced Python files — chaining, routing, parallelization, orchestrator-workers, evaluator-optimizer. Runs free on local Ollama.

title: kubawer21/StealthIt
summary: 🛠️ Enhance productivity with StealthIt, a hidden AI utility for screen analysis and voice interaction, ensuring efficiency without detection.

title: kjgdgch65g/nl-rag-qdrant-legal
summary: 📄 Explore Retrieval-Augmented Generation for legal document Q&A, leveraging QDrant and Ollama AI models with C# and .NET 9.0.

title: backupliton98-star/ai-commander-core
summary: Kodiqa-agent 2026 - Open Source AI Coding Agent with 7 Providers & 69 Commands

title: marcimastro98/Xenon
summary: A 100% local, all-in-one dashboard for the CORSAIR Xeneon Edge (and any Windows browser). System monitor, media & mic, a voice AI that can build dashboard pages for you, a Stream-Deck grid, RGB lighting, and Twitch/OBS control. Free, open-source, no account.

title: RunAnyDev/runany
summary: Open-source Astro MDX tech blog for AI setup guides, local LLMs, Ollama, developer tools, self-hosted tutorials, and automation workflows

title: Emanuele-Chiummo/llm-wiki-synapse
summary: Self-hosted AI wiki that organizes itself — LLM ingest, knowledge graph, cited chat, Obsidian-compatible vault. FastAPI + React + Tauri.

title: hamudoficcial/cli-prompts
summary: ✨ Build modern CLI applications with easy-to-use, beautiful components that enhance user interaction, free from dependencies and fully tested.

title: syedahmad0786/skills-runtime
summary: A minimal Agent Skills runtime implementing the Google/Kaggle whitepaper pattern (and the mechanism behind Claude Skills): folders of SKILL.md, cheap catalog routing, progressive disclosure, bundled deterministic scripts. Free local Ollama.
